gates.rule: All 17 top-level fields are present and non-empty.
The workflow has 3-7 sequential steps and every step contains all 12 required fields.
Every validationRule, failureSignal, and recoveryAction is observable enough to fail closed.
RACI values name concrete agents or roles, not anonymous owners.
KPIs have bounded targets, allowed units, and measurement methods.
fallbackRoute and escalationRoute name concrete destinations.
No placeholder or vague phrases from the contract blocked list remain.
Validation uses local assets and scripts only unless the user explicitly requests sourced research.
